novel_notes:
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	Zhang Zhao and Zhang Hong are not mentioned to be brothers in historic sources. They aren’t even specifically called brothers in the novel. [SGZ, ZZTJ, GoS]

full_text:
Zhang Zhao (Zibu) 張昭 (子布)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Zhao (張昭), styledZibu (子布), was born in Pengcheng commandery. Served Wu. Highly trusted internal administrator. Zhang Zhao was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Zhang Zhao lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
